description: Use this API to return VSC dc line model name. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, cval = vscmnam(name)

error_codes.description: dc line not in network but in model tables; ‘CVAL’ returned.
dc line not in network or in model tables; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
No model in model tables; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
